ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster group for regional analysis */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "defense_spending" REAL /* Defense spending budget */,
  "external_debt" REAL /* External debt */,
  "defense_spending_percentage_gdp" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on defense */,
  "defense_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Defense spending per capita */,
  "military_budget_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the military budget */,
  "foreign_aid_received" REAL /* Amount of foreign aid received for military purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "airport_totals" INTEGER /* Total number of airports */,
  "total_road_network" INTEGER /* Total length of road network in kilometers */,
  "railway_length" INTEGER /* Total length of railway network in kilometers */,
  "port_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of major port facilities */,
  "logistics_index" REAL /* Logistics performance index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "natural_resources" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "oil_production" INTEGER /* Oil production metric */,
  "oil_consumption" INTEGER /* Oil consumption metric */,
  "proven_oil_reserves" INTEGER /* Proven oil reserves */,
  "natural_gas_production" INTEGER /* Natural gas production metric */,
  "natural_gas_consumption" INTEGER /* Natural gas consumption metric */,
  "proven_natural_gas_reserves" INTEGER /* Proven natural gas reserves */,
  "coal_production" INTEGER /* Coal production metric */,
  "coal_consumption" INTEGER /* Coal consumption metric */,
  "proven_coal_reserves" INTEGER /* Proven coal reserves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manpower" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "available_manpower" INTEGER /* Available manpower */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "male_manpower" INTEGER /* Available male manpower */,
  "female_manpower" INTEGER /* Available female manpower */,
  "military_age" INTEGER /* Age range for military service */,
  "military_service_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of military service in years */,
  "military_service_voluntary" INTEGER /* Whether military service is voluntary or mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
column_names: Total area of the country in square kilometers
Percentage of GDP spent on defense
Annual growth rate of the military budget
Amount of foreign aid received for military purposes
Total length of road network in kilometers
Total length of railway network in kilometers
Duration of military service in years
Whether military service is voluntary or mandatory
